runs.result: {"a":[{"intent":"add wide-angle lens options to wishlist","risk":"m","cp":[3],"action":{"k":"callWebSkill","href":"https://uat.fotopia.com.hk/skills/fotopiastore/SKILL.md","fnName":"window._web_skills.fotopiaStore.addWishlist","arg":"{\"items\":[{\"stockId\":\"fd9504ce-9708-464a-94b6-e3ea8cea58e8\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as the most practical Leica-made no-ASPH wide-angle option: compact 28mm, in stock, and far more affordable than the limited black version.\"},{\"stockId\":\"b34b4287-a6fd-40ca-9e65-8f5e5acbc262\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a premium collectible no-ASPH Leica wide-angle: matte black limited edition Summaron-M 28mm F5.6 with classic rendering and top collector appeal.\"},{\"stockId\":\"3b0b4cde-9b33-43bc-b864-4b1412be76ca\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a budget-friendly capable no-ASPH 28mm option: modern remake of the classic 9-element design in black paint, good value for shooting.\"},{\"stockId\":\"a58c2fc9-c347-494f-b335-5b8b100a0f96\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as another budget-friendly capable no-ASPH 28mm option in chrome finish, for similar performance with different styling.\"}],\"navigateToWishlist\":true}"}}],"next":{"tip":"Verify the lens items appear in wish list, then ask the user which camera and lens to buy."}}

{"a":[{"intent":"add wide-angle lens wishlist options","risk":"m","action":{"k":"callWebSkill","href":"https://uat.fotopia.com.hk/skills/fotopiastore/SKILL.md","fnName":"window._web_skills.fotopiaStore.addWishlist","arg":"{\"items\":[{\"stockId\":\"fd9504ce-9708-464a-94b6-e3ea8cea58e8\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a capable non-ASPH Leica 28mm option: genuine Leica Summaron-M 28/5.6, compact, classic rendering, brand new/open box, and far more accessible in price than the limited black paint version.\"},{\"stockId\":\"b34b4287-a6fd-40ca-9e65-8f5e5acbc262\",\"comment\":\"Recommended if you want the top-end non-ASPH Leica option: Leica Summaron-M 28/5.6 black paint limited edition, collectible, new old stock, and strong vintage-style rendering.\"},{\"stockId\":\"3b0b4cde-9b33-43bc-b864-4b1412be76ca\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a more budget-friendly non-ASPH-style wide-angle choice: Light Lens Lab 28mm F2.8 9-element in black paint, faster at f/2.8 and inspired by the classic non-ASPH 9-element design.\"},{\"stockId\":\"a58c2fc9-c347-494f-b335-5b8b100a0f96\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as the chrome alternative of the Light Lens Lab 28mm F2.8 9-element: same capable non-ASPH-style design, lower cost, and suitable if you prefer silver/chrome finish.\"}],\"navigateToWishlist\":true}","cp":[3]}}],"next":{"tip":"Verify the lens items appear in wishlist, then ask user which camera and lens to buy."}}

{"a":[{"intent":"add lens options to wishlist","risk":"m","action":{"k":"callWebSkill","href":"https://uat.fotopia.com.hk/skills/fotopiastore/SKILL.md","fnName":"window._web_skills.fotopiaStore.addWishlist","arg":"{\"items\":[{\"stockId\":\"b34b4287-a6fd-40ca-9e65-8f5e5acbc262\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a premium non-ASPH 28mm option: classic rendering, ultra-compact, and a strong match for Leica M6 shooting if budget allows.\"},{\"stockId\":\"fd9504ce-9708-464a-94b6-e3ea8cea58e8\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a more affordable non-ASPH Leica 28mm option: capable wide-angle coverage, compact size, and easier entry price for pairing with an M6.\"},{\"stockId\":\"3b0b4cde-9b33-43bc-b864-4b1412be76ca\",\"comment\":\"Recommended as a budget-friendly non-ASPH style 28mm option: faster f/2.8 aperture and useful wide-angle capability for practical M6 use.\"}],\"navigateToWishlist\":true}"},"cp":[3]}],"next":{"tip":"Verify the lens items now appear in the wish list, then ask which camera and lens to buy."}}
